src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.general_idea: Introduce Spring beans for UserState, ConversationState, and MemoryStorage to enable state persistence in the bot.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.human_impl: @Bean public UserState userState(Storage storage) { return new UserState(storage); }

src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.general_idea: Update the Bot bean definition to accept and pass the newly created state objects to the EchoBot constructor.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.human_impl: public Bot getBot(ConversationState conversationState, UserState userState) { return new EchoBot(conversationState, userState); }

src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.general_idea: Move and add import statements to the top of the file to support the new state management classes.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Reorganized and expanded import statements to include dialog system classes and remove unused dependencies.
Introduced ConversationState and UserState fields to manage bot conversation context.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Added `private ConversationState conversationState;` and `private UserState userState;` fields.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Implemented a DialogSet with WaterfallDialogs to handle multi-turn conversations.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Added `private DialogSet dialogs;` and initialized it in the constructor with `menuDialog`, `talepDialog`, and `faturaDialog`.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Added logic to display a main menu and handle user selection between billing and requests.
Implemented a waterfall dialog flow for handling customer requests (faults, connections, meters).
Implemented a waterfall dialog flow for handling billing operations.
Enhanced user prompts with suggested actions (buttons) for better UX.

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated maven-compiler-plugin configuration to target Java 21.
Upgraded Spring Boot starter parent version to 2.7.18 to support newer dependencies.
Set the global java.version property to 21.
Updated maven.compiler.source and maven.compiler.target properties to 21.
Introduced a property for the Bot Builder version to manage dependency versions centrally.
Removed explicit version from spring-boot-starter-test to inherit from parent.
Upgraded log4j-api to version 2.17.1 for security and compatibility.
Upgraded log4j-core to version 2.17.1 for security and compatibility.
Changed bot-integration-spring version to use the new bot.builder.version property.
Added bot-builder dependency using the centralized version property.
Added bot-dialogs dependency using the centralized version property.
Updated maven-compiler-plugin source and target in the profile to Java 21.
Updated maven-javadoc-plugin source configuration to Java 21.

pom.xml~.general_idea: Reformatted the maven-compiler-plugin configuration from a single minified line to a multi-line structure for readability.
Added the bot-builder dependency to support bot framework functionality.
Added the bot-dialogs dependency to support dialog management in the bot.
